{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240127562434E66003C35BC1245A"}"},"total":14},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618379245266780952","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错不错，有点原著的味道。金光圣母名副其实，有点名气的对手，都安排打不过就逃了，或者抓住不杀，然后让对方把人救走。与原著不同的是主角是圣母，把自己人也保住了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773796532,"group_id":"7611099051890576446","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxdD5ciTr8PQWRx6E1ehMFPqFQ+5lpfFGzG7gYNaDHrr","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875250&x-signature=oRrJGA6Uz5DR%2BfCISt8M%2BfcegOI%3D","user_id":"3738786922238600","user_name":"書评更精彩"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3738786922238600","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7611099051890576446","book_info":{"abstract":"【洪荒+封神+女主洪荒+系统流+cp】
重生封神大劫，金光圣母睁眼就看见自己被十二金仙困在十绝阵里，魂飞魄散的痛感还在骨髓里灼烧——
上一世，她是截教最听话的棋子，忠心护教却落得身陨道消，眼睁睁看着截教万仙被天道当成韭菜割，三霄惨死、赵公明身首异处，连通天教主都被鸿钧老祖压在紫霄宫！
这一世，她揣着封神剧本杀回来，金光道体直接干翻阐教金仙，十绝阵改成屠宰场，十二金仙敢嚣张？一个！
封神榜？撕成碎片喂狗！
天道算计？直接逆了这狗屁天！
护三霄、保公明、救十天君，谁动截教一人，她便踏平阐教山门！
通天教主座下，截教第一女仙，雷法镇乾坤，金光耀三界！
这封神大劫，我命由我不由天！谁想当棋子？先问过我手中的金光宝镜！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o27f726fe22a1b941ba7a41b11f1ab77f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"草莓杀神","author_id":"","book_id":"7611099051890576446","book_name":"我，金光圣母，不做封神炮灰！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d89838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7611102263330734654","read_count":"31209","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"249697"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"106","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,封神,重生,系统,洪荒,同人,争霸,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o27f726fe22a1b941ba7a41b11f1ab77f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779470876&x-signature=XuGblH6SWb0c1UDvEqLlApmLofE%3D","tom
